calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler; Bailiff: R. Guitron. Petitioner, Virgil Jason Biteng was sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing Petitioner's name to Jason Veej Biteng. Order signed in open court.
